summary: Deterministic Media Pipeline VERIFIED - ALL 16 BACKEND TESTS PASSED + ALL 7 FRONTEND TESTS PASSED. Feed API returns ONLY thumbnail_small_url and poster_url fields. No old fields (thumbnail_url, scene_images) leak into response. All URLs are same-origin proxy paths (/api/media/r2/). Dashboard hero renders poster image, story cards render thumbnail images. No broken images on dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: _shape_item() in engagement.py returns ONLY thumbnail_small_url and poster_url - no old fields leak - VERIFIED
_resolve_media() reads from media.* nested object first, falls back to legacy flat fields for pre-migration jobs - VERIFIED
All 43 feed items have both thumbnail_small_url and poster_url populated (100% coverage) - VERIFIED
All URLs use same-origin proxy paths (/api/media/r2/) - no direct R2 URLs - VERIFIED
Dashboard hero renders poster_url from featured_story - VERIFIED
Dashboard story cards render thumbnail_small_url - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - used existing backfilled data (61 jobs with media schema)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deterministic media pipeline fully verified. Key findings: 1) Feed API returns ONLY thumbnail_small_url and poster_url - no old fields leak, 2) All 43 items have both fields populated (100%), 3) All URLs are same-origin proxy paths (/api/media/r2/), 4) Dashboard hero renders poster from API, 5) Story cards render thumbnails from API, 6) No broken images, 7) Login flow works with test credentials.
